name: tdp_alert_triage
description: NDR/TDP alert triage workflow - handles nested TDP alert payloads and automates HTTP-focused security investigation.
description_cn: NDR/TDP 告警调查工作流 - 兼容 TDP 嵌套告警结构并自动化研判 HTTP 类安全事件

nodes.description: 接收并解析 NDR/TDP 告警数据，提取关键字段、HTTP 请求响应和 IOC
nodes.code:
import json
import re

alert_input = inputs.get('alert_data', inputs.get('alert', {}))

if isinstance(alert_input, str):
    try:
        alert_input = json.loads(alert_input)
    except Exception:
        alert_input = {}

if isinstance(alert_input, list):
    alert_data = alert_input[0] if alert_input else {}
elif isinstance(alert_input, dict) and isinstance(alert_input.get('data'), list):
    alert_data = alert_input.get('data', [])[0] if alert_input.get('data') else {}
else:
    alert_data = alert_input if isinstance(alert_input, dict) else {}

net = alert_data.get('net', {}) or {}
http = net.get('http', {}) or {}
threat = alert_data.get('threat', {}) or {}
assets = alert_data.get('assets', {}) or {}

def pick(*values):
    for value in values:
        if value not in (None, '', [], {}):
            return value
    return ''

src_ip = pick(
    alert_data.get('attacker'),
    alert_data.get('external_ip'),
    net.get('src_ip'),
    net.get('flow_src_ip'),
    alert_data.get('sip'),
    alert_data.get('src_ip'),
    alert_data.get('src')
)
dst_ip = pick(
    alert_data.get('victim'),
    alert_data.get('machine'),
    alert_data.get('server_ip'),
    net.get('dest_ip'),
    net.get('flow_dest_ip'),
    alert_data.get('dip'),
    alert_data.get('dst_ip'),
    alert_data.get('dst')
)
src_port = pick(
    net.get('src_port'),
    net.get('flow_src_port'),
    alert_data.get('external_port'),
    alert_data.get('sport'),
    alert_data.get('src_port'),
    0
)
dst_port = pick(
    net.get('dest_port'),
    net.get('flow_dest_port'),
    alert_data.get('server_port'),
    alert_data.get('machine_port'),
    alert_data.get('dport'),
    alert_data.get('dst_port'),
    0
)
protocol = pick(
    net.get('app_proto'),
    net.get('type'),
    net.get('proto'),
    alert_data.get('net_app_proto'),
    alert_data.get('protocol'),
    alert_data.get('event_type'),
    'TCP'
)
alert_type = pick(
    threat.get('name'),
    alert_data.get('threat_name'),
    alert_data.get('alert_type'),
    threat.get('topic'),
    alert_data.get('type'),
    'unknown'
)
severity = pick(
    threat.get('severity'),
    alert_data.get('threat_severity'),
    alert_data.get('severity'),
    threat.get('level'),
    alert_data.get('level'),
    'medium'
)

req_line = pick(http.get('reqs_line'), alert_data.get('req_line'))
req_header = pick(http.get('reqs_header'), alert_data.get('req_header'))
req_body = pick(http.get('req_body'), alert_data.get('req_body'))
resp_line = pick(http.get('resp_line'), alert_data.get('rsp_line'), alert_data.get('resp_line'))
resp_header = pick(http.get('resp_header'), alert_data.get('rsp_header'), alert_data.get('resp_header'))
resp_body = pick(http.get('resp_body'), alert_data.get('rsp_body'), alert_data.get('resp_body'))
status = pick(http.get('status'), alert_data.get('http_status'), 0)

host = pick(http.get('reqs_host'), alert_data.get('url_host'), http.get('domain'), dst_ip)
raw_url = pick(http.get('raw_url'), http.get('url'), alert_data.get('url_path'))
url = ''
if host and raw_url:
    scheme = 'https' if net.get('is_https') else 'http'
    url = raw_url if str(raw_url).startswith(('http://', 'https://')) else f'{scheme}://{host}{raw_url}'

payload = f'请求行: {req_line}\n请求头: {req_header}\n请求体: {req_body}'
response = f'状态行: {resp_line}\n响应头: {resp_header}\n响应体: {resp_body}'

vuln_text = '\n'.join(str(item) for item in [
    threat.get('msg', ''),
    threat.get('topic', ''),
    alert_data.get('data', ''),
    url,
    json.dumps(threat.get('tag', []), ensure_ascii=False)
] if item)
vuln_matches = sorted(set(re.findall(r'\b(?:CVE|CNVD|CNNVD|XVE)-[A-Za-z0-9._-]+\b', vuln_text, flags=re.I)))
vuln_id = vuln_matches[0] if vuln_matches else ''

iocs = []
for candidate in [src_ip, dst_ip]:
    if candidate:
        iocs.append({'type': 'ip', 'value': candidate})
if url:
    iocs.append({'type': 'url', 'value': url})
if host and not re.match(r'^\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{1,3}){3}(?::\d+)?$', str(host)):
    iocs.append({'type': 'domain', 'value': str(host).split(':')[0]})

search_text = '\n'.join([payload, response, str(alert_data.get('data', '')), url])
url_pattern = r'https?://[^\s<>"]+'
for matched_url in re.findall(url_pattern, search_text):
    if matched_url not in [ioc['value'] for ioc in iocs if ioc['type'] == 'url']:
        iocs.append({'type': 'url', 'value': matched_url})

domain_pattern = r'(?:[a-zA-Z0-9](?:[a-zA-Z0-9-]{0,61}[a-zA-Z0-9])?\.)+(?:com|net|org|io|cn|co|edu|gov|info|biz|xyz|top|cc|tk|ml|ga|cf|gq|pw|ws|site|online|club|shop|live|fun|tech|pro|app|dev|cloud|host|space|vip|tw|hk|jp|kr|ru|uk|de|fr|eu|au|ca)'
for domain in re.findall(domain_pattern, search_text):
    if domain not in [ioc['value'] for ioc in iocs if ioc['type'] == 'domain']:
        iocs.append({'type': 'domain', 'value': domain})

outputs['parsed_alert'] = {
    'src_ip': src_ip,
    'dst_ip': dst_ip,
    'src_port': src_port,
    'dst_port': dst_port,
    'protocol': protocol,
    'payload': payload,
    'response': response,
    'url': url,
    'status': status,
    'alert_type': alert_type,
    'severity': severity,
    'vuln_id': vuln_id,
    'vuln_candidates': vuln_matches,
    'threat_result': threat.get('result', ''),
    'threat_confidence': threat.get('confidence', ''),
    'threat_msg': threat.get('msg', ''),
    'failed_by': threat.get('failed_by', []),
    'asset_ip': assets.get('ip', ''),
    'asset_name': assets.get('name', []),
    'iocs': iocs,
    'raw_alert': alert_data
}
outputs['has_vuln_id'] = bool(vuln_id)
outputs['iocs'] = iocs

nodes.description: 查询外部 IOC 的威胁情报，自动跳过内网/保留地址
仅在识别到标准漏洞编号时查询漏洞信息
使用 LLM 分析 HTTP 请求负载并按规范落盘
nodes.code:
import os
import datetime
from flocks.workspace.manager import WorkspaceManager

parsed_alert = inputs.get('parsed_alert', {})
payload = parsed_alert.get('payload', '')
alert_type = parsed_alert.get('alert_type', 'unknown')
url = parsed_alert.get('url', '')

prompt = f"""你是一位网络安全专家，正在分析 HTTP 请求负载。

告警类型: {alert_type}
URL: {url}
请求内容:
{payload}

请输出不超过 120 字的中文分析，包含：
1. 该流量更像攻击、扫描、误报还是正常请求
2. 具体攻击/扫描方式
3. 攻击意图或合法目的
"""

analysis_result = llm.ask(prompt)

ws = WorkspaceManager.get_instance()
output_dir = str(ws.get_workspace_dir() / 'outputs' / datetime.date.today().isoformat())
artifacts_dir = os.path.join(output_dir, 'artifacts')
os.makedirs(artifacts_dir, exist_ok=True)
tool.run('write', filePath=os.path.join(artifacts_dir, 'payload_analysis_llm_output.md'), content=analysis_result)

outputs['payload_analysis'] = analysis_result
outputs['has_payload_analysis'] = bool(analysis_result)

nodes.description: 结合 HTTP 响应和 TDP 判定字段判断攻击是否成功
等待并归一化并行节点输出，供最终报告使用
nodes.code:
outputs['parsed_alert'] = inputs.get('parsed_alert', {})
outputs['intel_results'] = inputs.get('intel_results', [])
outputs['vuln_info'] = inputs.get('vuln_info', {})
outputs['payload_analysis'] = inputs.get('payload_analysis', '')
outputs['response_analysis'] = inputs.get('response_analysis', '')
outputs['attack_success'] = inputs.get('attack_success', False)

nodes.description: 汇总 IOC、威胁情报、漏洞、请求响应分析并生成最终报告
